Old pixel art stuff I drew years ago.

License: CC0 (Public domain)

You can credit me as Glax

This pack contains:

* Various UI Elements
* A few backgrounds
* Several platformer tilesets, each with multiple colors (earth, leaves, clouds, trees, ruins)
* A few items
* A small dragon

Links:
    * My Website: https://dragon.best/
    * Itch https://mattbas.itch.io/
    * Open Game Art https://opengameart.org/users/mattbas
